_doc: Index of committed, machine-checked contracts. Each has a source of truth, a generate command, a check command, and a CI job. check_contracts.py runs each check command (300s timeout). A contract with no check command is a promise, not a gate. If a check uses `git diff`, it must also use `git add -AN` to catch newly-emitted untracked files.

contracts.name: bundle
contracts.check: npm run build && git add -AN && git diff --exit-code dist/

contracts.name: no-css-emitted
contracts.check: npm run build && git add -AN && if find dist -name '*.css' -type f | grep -q .; then echo 'ERROR: .css emitted'; exit 1; fi

contracts.name: api-surface
contracts.check: npm run contracts:api-surface && git add -AN && git diff --exit-code .agentic/contracts/snapshots/api-surface.txt

contracts.name: config-schema
contracts.check: npm run contracts:config-schema && git add -AN && git diff --exit-code .agentic/contracts/snapshots/config-schema.txt
